nameMeanings.name: Cruys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kreis
meanings: German: nickname for a noisy person, from Middle High German kreiss, kreisch ‘cry, noise’.
German: topographic name for someone who lived by or owned a circular field, from Middle Low German kreis (Middle High German kreiz) ‘circular open area, district, border’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from German Kreis ‘circle, circular field, border’.

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

nameMeanings.name: D'Esse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Meaning ‘gift’ in Hebrew; it is borne by the father of King David (1 Samuel 16), from whose line (according to the New Testament) Jesus was ultimately descended. It was popular among the Puritans, and is still used frequently in the United States, less so in Britain. As a girl's name it is a respelling of   Jessie .  Notable American bearers have included the outlaw  Jesse James  (  1847–82 ), the athlete  Jesse Owens  (  1913–80 ), and the politician  Jesse Jackson  (  b. 1941 ).

variants.name: Jessica
meanings: Apparently of Shakespearean origin. This was the name of the daughter of Shylock in The Merchant of Venice ( 1596 ). Shakespeare's source has not been established, but he presumably intended it to pass as a typically Jewish name. It may be from a biblical name that appeared, in the translations available in Shakespeare's day, as Jesca (Genesis 11:29; Iscah in the Authorized Version). This occurs in a somewhat obscure genealogical passage; Iscah appears to have been Abraham's niece. Notable bearers of the name include the British actress Jessica Tandy ( 1909–94 ), the British writer Jessica Mitford ( 1917–96 ), and the American actress Jessica Lange ( b. 1949 ). The name has been extremely popular since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Emma D'Esse Cruys was born in 1270, her father, Sir Robert de Cruwys, was 41 and her mother, Matilda Fitz Payne, was 23. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Oliver Ashe de Esse. She died in March 1365, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Emma D'Esse Cruys est née en 1270, son père, Sir Robert de Cruwys, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Matilda Fitz Payne, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Oliver Ashe d’Esse. Elle est décédée en mars 1365, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Emma D'Esse Cruys 1270 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert de Cruwys 41 und ihre Mutter Matilda Fitz Payne 23. Sie hatte mit Oliver Ashe de Esse mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im März 1365 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Emma D'Esse Cruys è nata il nel 1270, sua padre, Sir Robert de Cruwys, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Matilda Fitz Payne, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Oliver Ashe de Esse. Morì nel marzo 1365, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Emma D'Esse Cruysが1270年に生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Cruwysは41歳，母Matilda Fitz Payneは23歳であった。彼女はOliver Ashe de Esseとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1365年3月にイギリスイギリスデボンで95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Emma D'Esse Cruys(이)가 1270년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de Cruwys(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Fitz Payne(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Oliver Ashe de Esse(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1365년 3월 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Emma D'Esse Cruys nasceu em 1270, seu pai, Sir Robert de Cruwys, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Fitz Payne, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Oliver Ashe de Esse. Ela faleceu em março de 1365, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Emma D'Esse Cruys родилась в 1270 г., её отцу по имени Sir Robert de Cruwys было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Matilda Fitz Payne, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Oliver Ashe de Esse. Она умерла марта 1365 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Emma D'Esse Cruys nació en 1270, su papá, Sir Robert de Cruwys, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Matilda Fitz Payne, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Oliver Ashe de Esse. Murió en marzo de 1365, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 95 años.
